title: Better partners with Framework Ventures on $500 million Sky stablecoin credit plan amid mortgage tokenization push
message_html: Better partners with Framework Ventures on $500 million Sky stablecoin credit plan amid mortgage tokenization push ...
snippet: Better and Framework Ventures agreed to a $500 million credit plan via Sky's stablecoin ecosystem alongside a $45 million equity investment.

title: Binance adds Ondo’s tokenized stocks in latest RWA push
message_html: Binance adds Ondo’s tokenized stocks in latest RWA push ...
snippet: Binance listed 10 of Ondo's tokenized stocks, ETFs and commodities on Binance Alpha with UAE regulatory approval, expanding crypto access to real-world assets.
